allow: PowerShell(java -version 2>&1; if \($?\) { Write-Host "---"; \(Get-Command java\).Source } else { Write-Host "Java not found in PATH" })

PowerShell($tomcat = "C:\\软件\\tomcat\\apache-tomcat-9.0.118"; Write-Host "=== servlet-api ==="; Get-ChildItem "$tomcat\\lib\\servlet-api.jar" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object FullName, Length; Write-Host "=== jspSmartUpload ==="; Get-ChildItem "$tomcat\\webapps\\upload\\WEB-INF\\lib\\jspSmartUpload.jar" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object FullName, Length; Write-Host "=== 项目目录结构 ==="; Get-ChildItem "$tomcat\\webapps\\upload" -Recurse -Depth 4 | Select-Object FullName)
